description: Creates a point at the intersection of two geometric objects such as lines, curves, circles, or plots.
utility: Find the intersection point of two geometric objects

arguments.name: obj1
arguments.description: First geometric object (line, curve, circle, or plot)

arguments.name: obj2
arguments.description: Second geometric object (line, curve, circle, or plot)

alternates.description: Point at intersection of two lines, curves, circles, or plots

examples.scenario: Find y-axis intercept of a line for circle construction (axis intercepts lesson)
Find x-axis intercept of a line (axis intercepts lesson)
Find vertex of feasible region from constraint lines (linear programming lesson)
